items.name: Counting Bears Sorting
items.desc: Sort by color or number into cups.

items.name: Shape Scavenger Hunt
items.desc: Find circles, squares, etc. in the room.

items.name: Number Hopscotch
items.desc: Jump to the right number on a taped floor grid.

items.name: Story Time with Props
items.desc: Use puppets or toys to act out stories.

items.name: Alphabet Treasure Hunt
items.desc: Hide letters around the room to find.

items.name: Rhyme Time
items.desc: Sing rhyming songs or make a rhyming wall chart.

items.name: Bug Safari
items.desc: Look for insects in the garden.

items.name: Cloud Watching
items.desc: Lie on the ground and describe cloud shapes.

items.name: Recycle Sorting
items.desc: Teach environmental care by sorting trash.

items.name: Finger Painting
items.desc: Explore colors and texture using hands.

items.name: Bubble Wrap Stomp Art
items.desc: Stomp on paint-covered bubble wrap to make art.
